N. P. HOLD-UP

pages.raw_text:
BUTTE, May 1.-THE North Coast Limited on the
Northern Pacific was held up by masked robbers at
4 o'clock this morning.


Engineer Frank Glow killed. Fireman Sullivan
was badly wounded, being shot through the and
side


The bandits secured nothing fleeing apparently in fear
of detection in the light of the dawning day.


Welchs spur the of the holdup is Is miles east
of Butte Posses have left Butte and Whitehall with
bloodhounds from the Deer Lodge penitentiary and
though the bandits have hours start the officers believe
the dogs will overtake them.


Sheriff Webb, of Billings the train and found
the trail which he held till the arrival of the Butte posse


colored tramp stealing ride the tender was
He says the robbers boarded the tender at Butte
carrying suit They invited him to join them, Of
ferng him share Of the plumber but he says he refused


The robbers began shooting almost they had
compelled the engineer to bring the train to stop


Officers found the suit the coal tender filled with
80 pounds of dynamite Masks were discarded within
a few feet of the engine.


This is the fourth hodup of the North Coast crack
overland train the Northern Pacific in years.


The bandits evidently sought to dynamite the through
safe carrying currency consigments from Northwest
cities to Chicago and the East.
